series_metadata.series_description: Contains any confidential information pertaining to pre-permit authorization, plan approval, enforcement activities, and any information that is considered confidential by entities.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update in operating area ; Paper: Retain five years in operating area destroy data deemed not useful, microfilm data that is deemed useful and destroy hardcopy after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
